reviews.comment:
Atención al de paso con todos los servicios esenciales y con playa para el descanso del camionero y demás vehículos que estén de paso y la atención de sus empleados excelente y agrego que se puede retirar dinero en efectivo mediante la tarjeta de débito excelente en todo

(Translated by Google)
Attention to the roadside rest area with all essential services and a rest area for truckers and other passing vehicles. The staff's service is excellent, and I'd add that you can withdraw cash using a debit card. Excellent in every way.

reviews.comment:
La verdad una vergüenza la atencion de está estación de servicio como viajante para en todas y acá es pésimo en todas como una comida al plato pido pan y si no tienen te dan uno de hamburguesas , acá me dijeron que no lo tenían permitido , negarte un pan con una comida al plato con lo que cobran , miserables es poco una verdadera vergüenza

(Translated by Google)
Honestly, the service at this gas station is a disgrace. As a traveling salesman, I stop at all of them, and here it's terrible. Everywhere I order a meal, I ask for bread, and if they don't have any, they give you a hamburger bun. Here, they told me they weren't allowed to give bread to someone with a meal, especially considering what they charge. "Miserable" doesn't even begin to cover it; it's a real disgrace.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13657899365243523321/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzOTRpaGZREAE

reviews.comment:
Un buen lugar para comer pero la chica de la comida nos atendio muy mal, no nos queria preparar una hamburguesa y no nos queria dar lechuga y tomate para la hamburguesa de lechuga y tomate, son 3 estrellas solo porque la que nos cobro si nos dio un buen servicio. Ademas el baño de hombres estaba clausurado.

(Translated by Google)
It's a good place to eat, but the waitress gave us terrible service. She refused to make us a burger and wouldn't give us lettuce and tomato for a lettuce and tomato burger. It's only getting 3 stars because the waitress who took our money provided good service. Also, the men's restroom was closed.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13657899365243523321/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzeTh1RHdBRRAB
